description: Format the document /home/ga/Documents/origin_of_species_excerpt.docx, which contains an excerpt from Darwin's 'On the Origin of Species'. The four chapter titles (CHAPTER I through CHAPTER IV) must use 'Heading 1' style, and the eight section headers must use 'Heading 2' style. The document must include a Table of Contents at the beginning and be saved with these changes.

section_headers: Effects of Habit and of the Use or Disuse of Parts
Illustrations of the Action of Natural Selection
